title: Reposition Cheers Popup to Lower Right with Auto-Dismiss
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the success notification (cheers popup) to appear in the lower right corner and auto-dismiss after a few seconds, so that it doesn't obstruct my workflow.
description:
The cheers/success notification popup was sticking on screen and blocking interaction. Changes:

1. **Position**: Moved from its current location to the lower right corner of the viewport
2. **Auto-dismiss**: Popup now automatically disappears after 2-3 seconds instead of persisting until manually closed
acceptance_criteria: Cheers popup appears in the lower right corner of the viewport
Popup does not block user interaction with the underlying page
ux_changes: Cheers popup repositioned to lower right corner with a 2-3 second auto-dismiss timer, reducing obstruction of the user's workflow.
implementation_notes: CSS position changed to fixed bottom-right. JavaScript setTimeout added for auto-dismiss.
comment_summary: Developer deployed to staging. No issues reported.
